title: Bringing Solar Power to remote tribal settlements
author: Meera Suresh
excerpt: How we installed a community-owned solar microgrid in Wayanad's most remote village.
content: The project began with a simple question from the village headman: 'Can we have electricity that we own?' That question led us on a 6-month journey...

title: Lessons from deploying sensors in monsoon
author: Vineeth Menon
excerpt: What we learned about hardware resilience from our water monitoring project.
content: The Idukki district receives over 3000mm of rainfall annually. Our sensors had to survive conditions that would destroy most commercial equipment...

title: When farmers became our teachers
author: Anjali Rajan
excerpt: How traditional farming knowledge improved our AgriTech platform.
content: We went to Palakkad to teach farmers about technology. Instead, we learned more about soil, seasons, and survival than any textbook could teach...

title: Building trust in rural healthcare tech
author: Lakshmi Krishnan
excerpt: How a small health monitoring kiosk changed community perceptions about technology.
content: The first week, nobody used the kiosk. By the second month, there was a queue every morning...
